ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

A Flutter LLM Chat Client. Support Mobile & Desktop.

URL: https://github.com/Predidit/Kazumi
Language: dart
基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕，支持实时超分辨率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TNT-Likely/BeeCount
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TNT-Likely/BeeCount
Language: dart
🐝 跨端开源记账 · 自建云 + iCloud/WebDAV/S3 同步 · AI 记账 · MCP | Open-source bookkeeping across iOS/Android/Web · Self-hosted + iCloud/WebDAV/S3 sync · AI capture · MCP-enabled

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TomBursch/kitchenowl
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TomBursch/kitchenowl
Language: dart
KitchenOwl is a self-hosted grocery list and recipe manager. The backend is made with Flask and the frontend with Flutter. Easily add items to your shopping list before you go shopping. You can also create recipes and add items based on what you want to cook.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
